title: Registrate Me
body:
# Description
A simple registration mod for protecting the server and player accounts. It is possible to set up a waiting point and other commands for administrators. Below are all the commands:


# How to use
## Players
/register [password] [password] - registration

/login [password] - log in

## Admins
/set_idle_point [block coordinates] - Sets a waiting point for logining

/forcelogin [player] - Forcibly allows entry to the player

/unregister [player] - Deletes the player's password, allowing them to create a new one on the next login
